transport.description: Recommended for desktop AI clients (Claude Desktop, Cursor, Continue, Zed, Codex, Cline, Goose, Aider).
MCP spec 2025-06-18 Streamable HTTP transport on the local daemon.
Legacy SSE+POST transport on the local daemon.

install.command: npm install -g srift  # or run inside the repo: npm run srift

authentication.note: Local daemon binds to 127.0.0.1; no tokens required.

tools.name: srift_quick_share
tools.description: Zero-install file delivery: ensures a session, seeds file, and returns a public https://srift.app/d/<token> URL the recipient can fetch with any HTTP client (browser, curl, wget). Optional maxDownloads + ttlMs limits.

tools.name: srift_start_session
tools.description: Open a new E2EE room as host.

tools.name: srift_join_session
tools.description: Join an existing room by 7-char session ID.

tools.name: srift_session_status
tools.description: Current session, role, peers, pending joins.

tools.name: srift_close_session
tools.description: Tear down session and flush keys.

tools.name: srift_kick_user
tools.description: Host: disconnect and ban a peer.

tools.name: srift_send_file
tools.description: Offer a file to peers already inside the session (in-session transfer).

tools.name: srift_accept_transfer
tools.description: Accept and download an inbound file offer.

tools.name: srift_list_transfers
tools.description: List all active and recent transfers with progress.

prompts.name: send_file_to_user
prompts.description: Multi-step plan to deliver a file.

prompts.name: receive_file_from_user
prompts.description: Multi-step plan to open a room and accept incoming files.

prompts.name: start_collab_session
prompts.description: Multi-step plan to open a long-lived E2EE collaboration room.
